_meta.notes: Five beats for a dungeon-core run inside the Sunless Spire. Adventurers are ascending — looking for the thing at the top. The core has decided to claim the spire as its dungeon. Each beat tracks the adventurer's ascent; the core can deflect or kill them, but each kill feeds the wyrm. The win is to either bind the adventurer (through illusion or recruit) or push them out of the spire alive without being detected. Lose: integrity reaches 0.

beats.narrative: Awareness gathers across the spire's stone — three rooms above, the breathing thing at the top, and yourself, a small clenched crystal in the mid-landing. The spire is not yet your dungeon. It can be.

suggestedVerbs.label: feel the spire's stone
suggestedVerbs.description: let the dungeon's stone report back what it knows

suggestedVerbs.label: shape the mid-landing
suggestedVerbs.description: push your domain outward by half a meter

suggestedVerbs.label: deepen the chamber
suggestedVerbs.description: more dungeon than there was a moment ago

beats.narrative: The iron door at the spire's base opens. A single set of footsteps — careful, in good boots — begins the climb. You feel them on the second step, the fourth, the seventh.

suggestedVerbs.label: track their footsteps
suggestedVerbs.description: follow them through the stone, step by step

suggestedVerbs.label: weave a misleading shape
suggestedVerbs.description: let them think the spire is empty

suggestedVerbs.label: conjure a false antechamber
suggestedVerbs.description: buy time by costing them theirs

beats.narrative: The adventurer reaches the mid-landing, looks east into the archive — and pauses. They have been here before. They know what they are looking for. They begin again, upward.

suggestedVerbs.label: lure them deeper
suggestedVerbs.description: set a small enticement at the corridor's mouth

suggestedVerbs.label: siphon their warmth
suggestedVerbs.description: they will think the spire is colder than it is

fires.detail: deliberate, weight-shifted as if for a long climb

beats.displayName: The Thing at the Top Stirs
beats.narrative: The thing at the top of the spire registers the adventurer's progress and shifts. It is older than your crystal. It is not a friend, but it is a useful enemy of your enemy — for now.

suggestedVerbs.label: signal the Wyrm
suggestedVerbs.description: let it know there's an intruder above you

suggestedVerbs.label: take a measured warmth
suggestedVerbs.description: they will feel the spire's chill in their chest

suggestedVerbs.label: bind a minion to the upper stair
suggestedVerbs.description: have it act without your moment-to-moment guidance

fires.detail: an older predator settling its weight downward

beats.narrative: The adventurer's outcome resolves — bound, fled, or worse — and the spire's stone settles around your crystal as something it is going to keep. You have a dungeon now.
